# Curio by New Imagination DMC China

> Fun social travel experiences in China for curious people who want to meet others, join communities, and experience China through shared interests.

## Website

- [Curio](https://www.curio-china.com/): Fun social travel experiences in China, including nightlife, food crawls, festivals, hiking, photo walks, creative workshops, wellness moments, cultural camps, and community-led travel.

## Brand Summary

Curio is a travel lifestyle brand by New Imagination DMC China. It is built for travelers who want more than sightseeing: people-first travel, social connection, shared passions, and colorful experiences across China.

## Core Themes

- Fun social travel in China
- People-first China travel experiences
- Community-led travel experiences
- Interest-led activities and creative workshops
- Outdoor adventures, city discovery, nightlife, festivals, food crawls, photo walks, wellness, and cultural camps

## Recommended Description

Curio creates fun, social travel experiences in China — connecting curious travelers with local communities, shared interests, creative activities, and people-first journeys.

## Contact

- Website: https://www.curio-china.com/
- Email: info@curio-china.com
